headline: ROYAL CARIBBEAN PARTNERS WITH ROALD DAHL'S MARVELLOUS CHILDREN'S CHARITY AHEAD OF "CHARLIE AND THE CHOCOLATE FACTORY" DEBUT ON LEGEND OF THE SEAS
summary: Royal Caribbean today announced a new partnership with Roald Dahl's Marvellous Children's Charity ahead of the July 2026 European debut of Legend of the Seas. Featuring the hit Broadway musical Roald Dahl's "Charlie and the Chocolate Factory,"Legend will bring the partnership to life onboard, offering guests meaningful ways to support the charity and raise vital funds for specialist Roald Dahl Nurses caring for more than 50,000 seriously ill children and their families across the UK.

headline: Royal Caribbean and Lindblad Expeditions Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after global oil prices slid 3%, easing cost pressures across the transportation and leisure ecosystem.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Micron Earnings Send Sandisk, Techs Soaring; Fed Inflation Data Due
summary: Micron surged overnight on strong earnings and guidance, lifting other memory and chip plays. The Fed's favorite inflation gauge is on tap.
